general: Bring photo ID and insurance card
Bring prior imaging CDs if available

fasting.description: No fasting required for most imaging

contrast_exception.description: If contrast is ordered, do not eat for 4 hours before scan

transport.description: You can drive yourself unless sedation is used

medications.metformin: If taking metformin and receiving contrast, follow special instructions
medications.allergies: Inform technician of any allergies, especially to contrast or iodine

arrival.description: Arrive 15 minutes early to complete paperwork

paperwork: Complete MRI safety screening if applicable

mri_specific.remove_metal: Remove all metal objects including jewelry, watches, hairpins
mri_specific.claustrophobia: Inform staff if you are claustrophobic

ct_contrast.kidney_function: Recent kidney function test may be required
ct_contrast.hydration: Drink plenty of water after scan to flush contrast

red_flags: Severe allergic reaction history to contrast
